{"finish_reason": "stop", "text": "{
  "action": "keep",
  "confidence": 1.0,
  "criterion": "visual snapshot of real-time power distribution across all feeders",
  "morphs": {
    "heatmap.title": "Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].label": "Incomers",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].label": "UPS Feeders",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[2].label": "BPDB",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].label": "HHF Reactive",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[0].label": "Solar Incomer-1",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[1].label": "Solar Incomer-2",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[0].label": "UPS-01 CL:600KVA",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[1].label": "UPS-02 CL:600KVA",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[2].label": "UPS-03 CL:600KVA",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[3].label": "UPS-04 CL:600KVA",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[4].label": "UPS-05 CL:600KVA",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[5].label": "UPS-06 CL:600KVA",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[2].feeders[0].label": "BPDB-01 Lam-01&02",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[2].feeders[1].label": "BPDB-02 Lam-03&04",
    "heatmap.selectedSampleIndex": 11
  },
  "data_instructions": {
    "payload_shape": "heatmap",
    "orientation": "entity",
    "entity_dim": "feeder",
    "selection_dim": "metric",
    "selection_role": "produces",
    "binding": {
      "asset_id": "PCC-Panel-1",
      "table": "pcc_panel_1_feedbacks",
      "ts_col": "timestamp",
      "panel_id": null,
      "nameplate_scope": "default"
    },
    "window": {
      "lookback": "24h",
      "sampling": "2s",
      "time_mode": "none"
    },
    "fetch": {
      "endpoint": "real-time-monitoring",
      "window_seconds": 30,
      "interval_seconds": 2,
      "sample_count": 12,
      "range": null,
      "start": null,
      "end": null,
      "sampling": null,
      "metrics": [
        "kw",
        "pf",
        "kva",
        "kvar",
        "current",
        "voltage",
        "iUnbalance"
      ],
      "selection": null
    },
    "fields": [],
    "roster": [
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].totalKw",
        "kind": "derived",
        "role": "kpi",
        "metric": "kw",
        "agg": "sum_magnitude",
        "source": "$ctx",
        "base_columns": [
          "active_power_total_kw"
        ]
      },
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].totalKw",
        "kind": "derived",
        "role": "kpi",
        "metric": "kw",
        "agg": "sum_magnitude",
        "source": "$ctx",
        "base_columns": [
          "active_power_total_kw"
        ]
      },
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.history[0].sections[2].totalKw",
        "kind": "derived",
        "role": "kpi",
        "metric": "kw",
        "agg": "sum_magnitude",
        "source": "$ctx",
        "base_columns": [
          "active_power_total_kw"
        ]
      },
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.sectionContracts.hhf",
        "kind": "const",
        "role": "tile",
        "metric": "kw",
        "source": "const",
        "value": 0.0
      },
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.sectionContracts.ups",
        "kind": "const",
        "role": "tile",
        "metric": "kw",
        "source": "const",
        "value": 0.0
      },
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.sectionContracts.bpdb",
        "kind": "const",
        "role": "tile",
        "metric": "kw",
        "source": "const",
        "value": 0.0
      },
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.sectionContracts.incomers",
        "kind": "const",
        "role": "tile",
        "metric": "kw",
        "source": "const",
        "value": 0.0
      },
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.selectedSampleIndex",
        "kind": "const",
        "role": "tile",
        "metric": "index",
        "source": "const",
        "value": 11
      }
    ],
    "_honest_blanked": [
      "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].totalKw: no rated_kva on gic_* (loadPct unbindable)",
      "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].totalKw: no rated_kva on gic_* (loadPct unbindable)",
      "heatmap.history[0].sections[2].totalKw: no rated_kva on gic_* (loadPct unbindable)"
    ]
  }
}", "usage": {"completion_tokens": 1431, "prompt_tokens": 17334, "prompt_tokens_details": null, "total_tokens": 18765}}

{"finish_reason": "stop", "text": "{
  "action": "keep",
  "confidence": 1.0,
  "criterion": "heatmap provides an immediate, color-coded visual snapshot of live power status across all LT-PCC feeders, enabling rapid identification of active or anomalous circuits",
  "morphs": {
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[0].label": "Solar Incomer-1",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[0].id": "solar-incomer-1",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[1].label": "Solar Incomer-2",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[1].id": "solar-incomer-2",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[0].label": "GIC-01-N3-UPS-01 CL:600KVA",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[0].id": "gic-01-n3-ups-01",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[1].label": "GIC-01-N4-UPS-02 CL:600KVA",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[1].id": "gic-01-n4-ups-02",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[2].label": "GIC-01-N5-UPS-03 CL:600KVA",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[2].id": "gic-01-n5-ups-03",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[3].label": "GIC-02-N2-BPDB-02 For Lamination-03&04",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[3].id": "gic-02-n2-bpdb-02",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[4].label": "GIC-02-N5-UPS-04 CL:600KVA",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[4].id": "gic-02-n5-ups-04",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[5].label": "GIC-02-N6-UPS-05 CL:600KVA",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[5].id": "gic-02-n6-ups-05",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[6].label": "GIC-02-N7-UPS-06 CL:600KVA",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[6].id": "gic-02-n7-ups-06",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[2].feeders[0].label": "GIC-01-N8-BPDB-01 For Lamination-01&02",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[2].feeders[0].id": "gic-01-n8-bpdb-01",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[0].label": "GIC-15-N10-PCC-01 (Transformer-01)",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[0].id": "gic-15-n10-pcc-01",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[1].label": "GIC-15-N11-PCC-01 (Transformer-02)",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[1].id": "gic-15-n11-pcc-01"
  },
  "data_instructions": {
    "payload_shape": "heatmap",
    "orientation": "entity",
    "entity_dim": "feeder",
    "selection_dim": "metric",
    "selection_role": "produces",
    "binding": {
      "asset_id": "PCC-Panel-1",
      "table": "pcc_panel_1_feedbacks",
      "ts_col": "timestamp",
      "panel_id": null,
      "nameplate_scope": "default"
    },
    "window": {
      "lookback": "30s",
      "sampling": "2s",
      "time_mode": "none"
    },
    "fetch": {
      "endpoint": "real-time-monitoring",
      "window_seconds": 30,
      "interval_seconds": 2,
      "sample_count": 12,
      "range": null,
      "start": null,
      "end": null,
      "sampling": null,
      "metrics": [
        "kw",
        "kvar",
        "pf",
        "voltage",
        "current",
        "iUnbalance"
      ],
      "selection": null
    },
    "fields": [],
    "roster": [
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.history",
        "mode": "sections",
        "scope": "members",
        "sample": {
          "label": {
            "b": "ts_label",
            "fmt": "HH:MM:SS"
          }
        },
        "element": {
          "id": {
            "a": "name",
            "b": "slug"
          },
          "kw": {
            "b": "col",
            "c": "active_power_total_kw",
            "q": "power",
            "r": 2
          },
          "pf": {
            "b": "prefer_abs",
            "r": 3,
            "cs": [
              "kpi_true_pf",
              "power_factor_total"
            ]
          },
          "kva": {
            "b": "col",
            "c": "apparent_power_total_kva",
            "q": "power",
            "r": 2
          },
          "kvar": {
            "b": "col",
            "c": "reactive_power_total_kvar",
            "r": 2,
            "keep_sign": true
          },
          "label": {
            "a": "name",
            "b": "attr"
          },
          "current": {
            "b": "col",
            "c": "current_avg",
            "r": 1
          },
          "loadPct": {
            "b": "null",
            "why": "no rated_kva on gic_*"
          },
          "voltage": {
            "b": "col",
            "c": "voltage_avg",
            "r": 1
          },
          "iUnbalance": {
            "b": "col",
            "c": "current_unbalance_pct",
            "r": 2
          },
          "shortLabel": {
            "a": "name",
            "b": "attr"
          }
        },
        "replace": "wholesale",
        "section": {
          "id": "slug_of_group",
          "label": "title_of_group"
        },
        "group_by": "section_defs",
        "match_by": [
          "type",
          "load_group",
          "name_prefix"
        ],
        "unmatched": {
          "id": "slug_of_load_group",
          "note": "members matching no section_def group into a derived section labeled from their load_group; deriveRosterFromHistory renders any section id — group, never drop",
          "label": "load_group",
          "policy": "derived_section"
        },
        "role_filter": "all",
        "section_agg": {
          "totalKw": {
            "r": 2,
            "of": "kw",
            "agg": "sum_magnitude"
          },
          "totalKva": {
            "r": 2,
            "of": "kva",
            "agg": "sum_magnitude"
          },
          "totalKvar": {
            "r": 2,
            "of": "kvar",
            "agg": "sum_magnitude"
          }
        },
        "elements_key": "feeders",
        "section_defs": [
          {
            "id": "incomers",
            "label": "Incomers",
            "roles": [
              "incoming"
            ],
            "types": [
              "incomer",
              "solar-incomer"
            ],
            "load_groups": [
              "incomer",
              "solar"
            ],
            "name_prefixes": [
              "incomer-",
              "solar-incomer-"
            ]
          },
          {
            "id": "ups",
            "label": "UPS Feeders",
            "types": [
              "ups"
            ],
            "load_groups": [
              "ups"
            ],
            "name_prefixes": [
              "ups-"
            ]
          },
          {
            "id": "bpdb",
            "label": "BPDB",
            "types": [
              "bpdb"
            ],
            "load_groups": [
              "bpdb"
            ],
            "name_prefixes": [
              "bpdb-"
            ]
          },
          {
            "id": "hhf",
            "label": "HHF Reactive",
            "types": [
              "hhf"
            ],
            "load_groups": [
              "hhf"
            ],
            "name_prefixes": [
              "hhf-"
            ]
          }
        ],
        "incomers_rule": "role='incoming' members MUST appear in the incomers section — never excluded from heatmap.history (PCC-4 defect 2026-07-03: _reporting_pairs dropped them)",
        "reporting_only": false,
        "incomers_included": true,
        "empty_members_rule": "zero-row members are KEPT as blank rows (per-LEAF degradation, 2026-07-03 sweep fix): a dark meter is a real entity with honest-null readings, exactly like the kept blank incomers; dropping it hid the whole GIC-05 section. Coverage stays the honest telemetry."
      },
      {
        "v": 0,
        "mode": "const",
        "slot": "heatmap.selectedSampleIndex"
      }
    ],
    "coverage_attach": "widgets._coverage",
    "_honest_blanked": [
      "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[0].kw: member has_data=N (Solar Incomer-1)",
      "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[0].pf: member has_data=N (Solar Incomer-1)",
      "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[0].kva: member has_data=N (Solar Incomer-1)",
      "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[0].kvar: member has_data=N (Solar Incomer-1)",
      "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[0].current: member has_data=N (Solar Incomer-1)",
      "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[0].loadPct: member has_data=N (Solar Incomer-1)",
      "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[0].voltage: member has_data=N (Solar Incomer-1)",
      "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[0].iUnbalance: member has_data=N (Solar Incomer-1)",
      "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[1].kw: member has_data=N (Solar Incomer-2)",
      "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[1].pf: member has_data=N (Solar Incomer-2)",
      "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[1].kva: member has_data=N (Solar Incomer-2)",
